name: FIREZ 900 Slimline
shortDescription: The FIREZ 900 Slimline is the perfect solution for homeowners looking to enjoy the beauty of a premium electric fireplace where installation space is limited. With an ultra-slim 175mm built-in depth, it's ideal for existing chimney breasts, flat-wall installations and compact media walls.
description:
The FIREZ 900 Slimline is the perfect solution for homeowners looking to enjoy the beauty of a premium electric fireplace where installation space is limited. With an ultra-slim 175mm built-in depth, it is ideal for fitting into an existing chimney breast or creating a sleek flat-wall media wall installation, delivering stunning flame realism without the need for major structural alterations.

Featuring the same cutting-edge technology found throughout the FIREZ range, the 900 Slimline showcases the incredibly realistic 3D Reflectory Flame effect, producing one of the most lifelike electric fires available today. Control every feature with ease using the supplied remote control, smartphone app, Amazon Alexa voice control, or the convenient manual push-button controls. The result is a beautifully realistic fireplace experience that combines luxury styling with everyday convenience.

Every FIREZ 900 Slimline is supplied with a premium high-definition mixed log fuel bed as standard, creating the authentic appearance of a real wood-burning fire without the smoke, ash or maintenance. Designed for one-sided installation, it is the perfect choice for traditional fireplace openings, chimney breast renovations and compact media wall designs.
features: Perfect for existing chimney breasts and flat-wall installations
Premium high-definition mixed log fuel bed included
Multiple flame colours and adjustable flame effects
Independent over-bed and under-bed LED lighting
closingText: Combining space-saving slimline design, outstanding flame realism and intelligent smart-home technology, the FIREZ 900 Slimline Electric Fireplace is the ideal choice for anyone looking to enhance their home with a stylish, contemporary electric fire that fits beautifully into both modern and traditional interiors.
callToAction: Available from Zebra Trades with supply only or professional installation.

seo.title: FIREZ 900 Slimline Electric Fire & Media Wall | Zebra Trades
seo.description: Discover the FIREZ 900 Slimline electric fireplace with realistic 3D flames, smart controls and an ultra-slim 175mm built-in depth. Supply only or fully installed by Zebra Trades.
seo.altText: FIREZ 900 Slimline electric fireplace fitted into a contemporary chimney breast beneath a television.
